name: clawsec-analyst
description: AI-powered security analyst using Claude API for automated advisory triage, pre-installation risk assessment, and natural language security policy parsing
author: prompt-security

files.description: Skill metadata, SBOM, and OpenClaw configuration
Skill documentation with YAML frontmatter and usage instructions
OpenClaw hook metadata (events, rate limiting, handler registration)
Main entry point for skill logic (OpenClaw hook handler + NanoClaw CLI)
Node.js dependencies and scripts
TypeScript configuration
TypeScript type definitions for advisory feed, policies, and analysis results
Claude API client wrapper with retry logic and exponential backoff
Advisory feed integration with Ed25519 signature verification
Result caching for offline resilience and API rate limit mitigation
State persistence for rate limiting and hook deduplication
Automated advisory triage with AI-powered risk prioritization
Pre-installation risk scoring for skills (0-100 scale)
Natural language security policy parser with confidence thresholds
Unit tests for Claude API client error handling and retries
Unit tests for feed reading and signature verification
Unit tests for advisory analysis logic
Unit tests for risk assessment scoring
Unit tests for policy parsing and validation
Integration test for end-to-end advisory triage workflow
Integration test for risk assessment workflow
Integration test for policy parsing workflow

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude access (obtain from https://console.anthropic.com/)

CLAWSEC_ALLOW_UNSIGNED_FEED.description: Emergency bypass for signature verification (dev only, NOT for production)

CLAWSEC_HOOK_INTERVAL_SECONDS.description: Override default 300s rate limit for hook execution

capabilities: Automated security advisory triage with AI-powered risk assessment
Pre-installation skill risk scoring (0-100 scale) with dependency CVE cross-reference
Natural language security policy parsing with confidence thresholds
Integration with ClawSec advisory feed (Ed25519 signature verification)
Offline resilience via result caching (7-day TTL)
Exponential backoff retry logic for Claude API rate limits
NanoClaw CLI invocation support for manual analysis
